page_content:
CLFS520 Concepts of Modern Chemistry (3 Credits)

Basic concepts and recent advances in the chemical sciences. It is designed to be a review of the first two years of college chemistry for the student persuing the Master of Life Science degree with a concentration in chemistry. Also includes material preparatory for LFSC courses such as LFSC 690 and LFSC 655. A basic text supplemented by on line text, problems and links. (Not acceptable for credit towards a degree).
